themes: Manager-heavy backlog with long wait times: The overwhelming majority of contacts are Managers, many of whom have been waiting 100–350+ days, signaling a systemic gap between product feedback requests and follow-through that risks eroding trust with key day-to-day power users.

Repeat accounts indicate unresolved pain points: Several accounts—Travel Leaders Group, Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices, Avenue5 Residential, Holiday Inn Express, Anytime Fitness, Ford, and 29th Street Living—appear multiple times, suggesting persistent, unresolved product needs that span multiple team members and should be treated as high-priority clusters.

Multisector breadth requires flexible product positioning: The backlog spans hospitality, residential property management, fitness, food & beverage, automotive, travel, and home services, highlighting that the product areas under discussion must address diverse use cases and that outreach messaging should be tailored to each vertical's specific workflow and ROI language.
